description: custom.css dosyasında .link-card ve .brand-card bileşenlerinde translateY(-2px) hover animasyonu kullanılıyor. Hareket hassasiyeti olan kullanıcılar için prefers-reduced-motion medya sorgusu eklenmeli: @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .link-card:hover, .brand-card:hover { transform: none; } }
summary: FN-010 is already complete. Commit `5ec2172` added the `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` block at the end of `custom.css` with correct selectors (`.link-card:hover`, `.link-card.featured:hover`, `.brand-card:hover` all set to `transform: none`). Verified: CSS braces are balanced (33/33), media query is not nested inside the responsive block, `.featured` variant is included for specificity, and project memory already documents the accessibility fix. No build/lint/test infrastructure exists for this static Mintlify site.
